issue.title: deno install permission denied formatjs
issue.body:
Version:
deno --version
deno 2.3.6 (stable, release, aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu)
v8 13.7.152.6-rusty
typescript 5.8.3

deno install results in the following error

```
error: Can't set up 'formatjs' bin at /Users/alitamoore/workspaces/monorepo/node_modules/.deno/@formatjs+cli@2.15.0/node_modules/@formatjs/cli/bin/formatjs

Caused by:
    Permission denied (os error 13)
```

running
`sudo chmod 755 /Users/alitamoore/workspaces/monorepo/node_modules/.deno/@formatjs+cli@2.15.0/node_modules/@formatjs/cli/bin/formatjs` fixes the issue but this happens everytime it's a fresh install of dependencies
